languages.label: Hindi
languages.readinessReason: Primary public interface copy is staged for local runtime review.

languages.label: Haryanvi
languages.readinessReason: Regional language labels are staged; community validation remains open.

languages.label: Punjabi
languages.readinessReason: Gurmukhi labels are staged; speaker review remains open.

frames.title: Home Frame
frames.description: A clear entry surface for Aam Jantaa without production claims.

frames.title: Language Select
frames.description: Select Hindi, Haryanvi, or Punjabi mode before entering the dashboard.

frames.title: Aam Jantaa Dashboard
frames.description: Public dashboard with feature cards, status badges, and offline labels.

frames.title: Feature Entry Cards
frames.description: Module cards for education, radio, search, health, lipi, and broadcast surfaces.

frames.title: Runtime Health
frames.description: Shows local runtime health while hardware attestation and release authority remain blocked.

frames.title: Evidence / Blocked Reason View
frames.description: Explains missing hardware-root attestation, release signer verification, rollback drill, and operator quorum.

frames.title: Rollback / Offline Fallback View
frames.description: Fallback mode remains staged until rollback drill evidence is captured.

features.title: Digital Gurukul
features.description: Local-first learning entry for stories, values, and student progress surfaces.
features.readinessReason: Pedagogy frames exist; real content mapping and learning ledger evidence remain open.

features.title: Radio Vaigyaaniq
features.description: Local radio launch surface for regional audio and broadcast planning.
features.readinessReason: Radio UI exists, but live audio IPC, edge device admission, and launch broadcast proof are not complete.
features.blockedReason: Zero-drop audio IPC and verified edge broadcast hardware are not yet proven.

features.title: Local Search
features.description: Search local routes, packages, docs, blockers, and runtime evidence without cloud calls.
features.readinessReason: Unified local search route and command palette tests pass for staged product scope.

features.title: Runtime Health
features.description: Shows local heartbeat, degraded state, and current blocked governance status.
features.readinessReason: Local runtime status is visible; production hardware trust remains blocked.

features.title: Lipi Learning
features.description: Ancient script learning entry for Brahmi, Kharosthi, and Siddham datasets.
features.readinessReason: Script batch assets exist; public learning UI and speaker-reviewed labels remain staged.

features.title: Community Broadcast
features.description: Community message and public information broadcast entry.
features.readinessReason: Broadcast concept is staged; physical node certification and operator approvals are missing.
features.blockedReason: Release signer verification and operator quorum are not captured.
